fields.name: 🎨 What
fields.value: Mesmerizing particle system with 800+ particles in spiral pattern, mouse attraction physics, click-to-explode interaction, and color cycling

fields.name: ✨ Features
fields.value:
• Mouse attraction: Particles gravitate toward cursor
• Click to explode: Creates bursts of colorful particles
• Color cycling: Particles shift through spectrum over time
• Trail effects: Beautiful fading trails

footer.text: Created by Mira • Hourly Experiment #7f0558f8 • 2026-05-08 12:25 JST
